rationale: Selected cip29/bert-blooms-taxonomy-classifier as the BERT-named replacement for the deleted kabir5297/bloom_taxonomy_classifier. cip29 carries the strongest usage signal among the three short-listed Bloom-classifier candidates (414 downloads, apache-2.0 license, BERT-based 'generated_from_trainer' provenance), satisfying both the operational requirement (BERT-named member of the ensemble) and the audit-trail requirement (trackable downloads + permissive license). Decision logged 2026-05-03 per Phase 8 plan amendment 1; the SHA-pin + _CIP29_TO_BLOOM label-map translation table land in Phase 8 ST 4.

alternatives_considered.reason_rejected: Lower download count than cip29 and no 'bert' semantic match in the model name; ensemble member 1 must be a BERT-named Bloom classifier for operator clarity in the audit trail.

Newest of the three with only 18 downloads and 3 likes — insufficient usage signal to justify pinning as a production audit-trail member; a BERT classifier needs a non-trivial usage track record before it earns a place in the SHA-pinned default ensemble.

context: Phase 8 Subtask 9 closing-cleanup decision-capture artifact. Subtask 4 consumes the selection to replace the placeholder 'main' revision in lib/classifiers/bloom_bert_ensemble.py::_DEFAULT_ENSEMBLE_MEMBERS with a concrete HuggingFace commit SHA, plus add a _CIP29_TO_BLOOM label-map translation table mirroring the existing _SST2_TO_BLOOM pattern at bloom_bert_ensemble.py:100-103. The pre-deletion incumbent kabir5297/bloom_taxonomy_classifier currently 401s on HuggingFace, motivating this replacement.
